generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in permafrost regions to measure ground thermal state with ±0.1°C accuracy at 15-minute intervals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitive soil moisture sensor with 1% volumetric water content resolution, sampling every 30 minutes in active layer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance GroundDisplacementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Fiber-optic distributed temperature sensing (DTS) system measuring ground deformation with 1mm precision at 10m spatial resolution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
]

instance AtmosphericPressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Barometric pressure sensor with 0.1hPa accuracy, logging hourly data for atmospheric correction of ground measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GroundDisplacementSensor
]

instance AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AtmosphericPressureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coupled heat and mass transfer model (STOMP) simulating active layer thickness with 10cm vertical resolution and 1-day time steps"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostModelingEnabler
]

instance SoilHydrologicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "HYDRUS-1D model parameterized for organic-rich permafrost soils with Richards' equation solver for unsaturated flow"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilModelingEnabler
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data from 2020-2023 with 15-minute resolution, quality-checked for sensor drift and atmospheric correction applied"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostModelingEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Volumetric water content measurements with 30-minute resolution, gap-filled using linear interpolation for missing values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilModelingEnabler, DataValidationEnabler
]

instance GroundDisplacementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Spatial deformation profiles with 10m resolution, processed to remove tidal and seasonal noise components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StructuralAnalysisEnabler
]

instance AtmosphericPressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hourly barometric pressure records used for atmospheric correction of ground measurements and model boundary conditions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PermafrostModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing cluster running STOMP model with 64-core parallelization and 1TB RAM for large-domain simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables PermafrostThermalService, ThawDepthForecastService
]

instance SoilModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dockerized HYDRUS-1D environment with GPU acceleration for inverse modeling of soil hydraulic parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables SoilMoistureService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Three.js-based web application for 3D visualization of permafrost temperature fields with time-slicing capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, ResearchPresentationService
]

instance DataPreprocessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based pipeline using Pandas and NumPy for data cleaning, gap-filling, and atmospheric correction"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataQualityService
]

instance DataValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning module using Random Forest for anomaly detection in soil moisture time series"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataQualityService, SensorCalibrationService
]

instance StructuralAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB-based finite element analysis toolkit for interpreting ground displacement data in terms of structural integrity"
    DTDFVocab:enables InfrastructureRiskService, GeohazardAssessmentService
]

// C6: Services
instance PermafrostThermalService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time active layer thickness monitoring service with ±5cm accuracy using ensemble model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActiveLayerThicknessInsight
]

instance SoilMoistureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seasonal soil moisture forecasting service with 7-day lead time and 10% volumetric error margin"
    DTDFVocab:provides SoilMoistureForecastInsight
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive web dashboard showing real-time sensor data, model outputs, and alert thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemHealthInsight
]

instance DataQualityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated data validation service flagging outliers and recommending corrective actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataQualityInsight
]

instance InfrastructureRiskService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Geohazard assessment service predicting infrastructure damage probability based on displacement patterns"
    DTDFVocab:provides RiskAssessmentInsight
]

instance ThawDepthForecastService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seasonal thaw depth prediction service with 3-month lead time and 15cm confidence interval"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThawDepthForecastInsight
]

instance ResearchPresentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation service creating PDF/HTML summaries of key findings for stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResearchSummaryInsight
]

instance SensorCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Periodic sensor calibration service using reference standards and field comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationRecommendationInsight
]

instance GeohazardAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Spatial risk mapping service identifying high-probability thaw settlement zones"
    DTDFVocab:provides GeohazardMapInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ActiveLayerThicknessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current active layer thickness measurement with historical trend analysis showing 20cm increase since 2015"
]

instance SoilMoistureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted volumetric water content for next 7 days with confidence intervals and drought risk indicators"
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system status including sensor health, data quality metrics, and model performance indicators"
]

instance DataQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated quality assessment report with flagged anomalies, missing data statistics, and correction recommendations"
]

instance RiskAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Probabilistic risk assessment for infrastructure damage with color-coded risk zones and mitigation suggestions"
]

instance ThawDepthForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Seasonal thaw depth prediction with uncertainty quantification and comparison to historical records"
]

instance ResearchSummaryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Executive summary of key findings including temperature trends, moisture patterns, and structural risk assessments"
]

instance CalibrationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for sensor recalibration including required adjustments and next calibration schedule"
]

instance GeohazardMapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive geospatial map showing thaw settlement risk with 5m resolution and confidence levels"
]

instance ActivateAutomatedAlertsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically triggers email/SMS alerts when predefined thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates maintenance work orders based on sensor health diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UpdateModelParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts model parameters based on latest field observations and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateResearchReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Compiles comprehensive research report with visualizations and statistical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeployMitigationMeasuresAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommends and schedules infrastructure stabilization measures based on risk assessments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
